Bob Dylan
Van Andel Arena
Grand Rapids, MI, USA
11/6/2001

Rip from audio CD
CDR > EAC > .wav  > FLAC Frontend > FLAC 
Quality: Very Good

Disc 1
1)	Hummingbird
2)	Mr. Tambourine Man
3)	It's Alright Ma
4)	This World Can't Stand Long
5)	Cry A While
6)	Every Grain of Sand
7)	Floater
8)	Tombstone Blues
9)	Po' Boy
10)	John Brown
11)	It's All Over Now, Baby Blue 

Disc 2
1)	Summer Days
2)	Sugar Baby
3)	Drifter's Escape
4)	Rainy Day Women
5)	Love Sick
6)	Like A Rolling Stone
7)	Forever Young
8)	Honest With Me 
9)	Blowing in the Wind
10)	All Along the Watchtower


Concert # 1370 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 22 of the 2001 US Fall Tour. 2001 concert # 93.

Concert # 275 with the 12th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), David Kemper (drums & percussion).

14, 911, 18, 20 acoustic with the band.

2, 6, 14 Bob Dylan (harmonica).

10 Larry Campbell (bouzouki).

1, 4, 18, 20 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

Note. Live debut of Po' Boy
